step.cmd: From the Predefined or the User define section, open a report that you would like to print.
Click the Print Report icon from the top-right corner of the screen.
step.stepresult: The Print dialog-box is displayed. Print Dialog-box

step.cmd: Set the print settings for your desired print options.
step.info: You can select the quantity of copies desired, page selection locations, page orientation (portrait to landscape and vice versa), and printer.

step.cmd: Click Apply, if you've made changes in the print setting.
